extract: Iron Moth (Japanese: テツノドクガ Tetsunodokuga) is a dual-type Fire/Poison Paradox Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Iron Moth is said to be either a future relative of Volcarona or a version of it from a parallel timeline. It also has an ancient counterpart, Slither Wing.
